label: Bleed Detonation
description: Rupture T2+ detonates on Power Slam; Impale T3 detonates on recall — together, every throw-and-return cycle is a bleed burst.

label: Mark Spread on Parry
description: Backlash T2 marks every enemy in its AoE; Sunder T3 spreads that mark to nearby enemies on any hit — a single parry can mark a whole wave.

label: Redundant Dash Refunds
description: You have multiple dash-refund sources active. Any kill that triggers one likely triggers all — the extras provide no additional refunds. Consider drafting differently.

label: Dead Pick: Air Dash
description: Aether Step (shop upgrade) already sets your dash charges to 2 via Math.max. Drafting Air Dash adds nothing. This pick was wasted.
